notes: Arm C of debate-efficacy-study: all challengers Claude-only to isolate challenger-side model diversity. Judge_default=gpt-5.4 matches arm D production (judge held constant — not invoked during challenge command anyway, but kept for parity). Frame dual-mode: structural=sonnet no-tools, factual=opus tools-on (cross-family-equivalent within Claude: different sizes, same family). Active during study; rolled back via /tmp/debate-models.prod.backup.json after runs. 2026-04-18: reverted Opus 4.7 → 4.6 (study uses 4.6 to match prod, 4.7 reserved for IDE coding only).
